name: Dutch Apple Brandy Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Prepare Crust: Combine all ingredients and press on bottom and 1 1/2 inches up sides of a 10-inch springform pan. Bake in a 350°F oven about 10 minutes or until golden. Cool.
Filling: Beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add sugar, beating well. Add brandy, cinnamon, vanilla, and nutmeg. Blend well. Add eggs, one at a time, beating just until combined. Stir in apple sauce and whipping cream. Pour into cooled crust. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes or until center appears nearly set. Meanwhile, prepare Crumb Topping: Combine all ingredients and mix until crumbly. Sprinkle over cake. Bake for 10 more minutes or until cake is just set. Cool for 5 minutes on a wire rack. Loosen sides of cake. Cool for 30 minutes. Remove sides of pan. Cover and chill well.
